headline: Woman Sends 'Hey, What's Up' Text To 47 Contacts During Boring Meeting
summary: She now has 14 active conversations she has no intention of continuing.
fullBody: Sarah Distracted sent a mass 'hey! what are you up to?' text to her entire contact list during a mandatory Zoom training. 'I immediately regretted it,' Distracted admitted. She now has 14 unread responses ranging from 'not much, you?' to 'omg I was just thinking of you!!!' Distracted has implemented a '72-hour cooling-off period' before responding. Her phone currently has 47 notifications and 'a lot of anxious energy.'
